results.justification: EXACT TWIN — linear predictability + Q/K/V orthogonal subspace per-layer dependencies IS the 2-source dual-fold split + null-projection mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — projecting model parameters to orthogonal null-space of HalluSpace IS the null-projection on fundamental P_⊥ mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — OrthoGrad retain-subspace + orthogonal-complement gradient projection IS the null-projection on fundamental drone subspace mechanism.
Lotus low-rank gradient projection + adaptive subspace switching overlaps with 3-style routing + 5-substyle modulator mechanism.
MLA compression + reconstruction projection overlaps with formant-merge 2-subspace fusion narrow-band selection mechanism.
Harmonic Constraint Circle-of-Fifths + per-head surgical gradient overlaps with formant-merge focused-overtone gate per-head modulator mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — frequency band attention + selective frequency-component weighting IS the formant-merge focused-overtone 1-2kHz narrow-band selection mechanism.
Spectral Attention Module + complex-valued + frequency combinations overlaps with formant-merge biphonic 2-subspace fusion mechanism.
